summary: Iteration 131: Testing NEW Rewards Platform User Sync features. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified - Rewards Platform Sync section in Diagnostics tab with working 'Sync All Users' button.
critical_code_review_comments: rewards_sync_service.py correctly implements sync_user_to_rewards, batch_sync_all_users, get_sync_status
GET /api/rewards/admin/sync-status returns hub_users, synced_users, rewards_platform_users counts
store-token JWT payload now includes 'role' field as specified
Auto-sync hooks correctly added in: register() in server.py, update_profile() in users.py, change_password() in users.py
RewardsPlatformSync component in AdminSettingsPage.jsx with proper data-testid attributes
api.js has adminSyncAllUsers, adminSyncUser, adminGetSyncStatus methods
Sync service tries POST /external/users first, falls back to POST /external/members
Role mapping correctly converts hub roles to rewards platform is_admin/is_super_admin flags
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 131 tested Rewards Platform User Sync features. Backend endpoints: POST /api/rewards/admin/sync-all-users (master admin), POST /api/rewards/admin/sync-user/{id} (admin), GET /api/rewards/admin/sync-status. Frontend: Diagnostics tab in Admin Settings has 'Rewards Platform Sync' section with stats (14 hub users, 14 synced, 18 rewards platform) and 'Sync All Users' button. Batch sync successfully synced 14/14 users. store-token JWT now includes 'role' field. Auto-sync hooks fire on registration, profile update, and password change.

sync_all_users.returns: success (bool), summary (total, success, created, updated, failed, errors)

store_token_role.jwt_fields: sub, email, name, role, level, points, iss='crosscurrent-hub', aud='crosscurrent-store'

sync_stats.displays: Hub Users (14), Synced (14), Rewards Platform (18), Last Batch Sync timestamp

sync_results.displays: Total, Success, Created, Failed with counts
